oddities.description:
Lock the top half of the dial (The part with the Boss name and image)

Use the knob attached to that segment to rotate the dial

If it isn't working, make sure you didn't lock the section of the dial that displays the numbers

Use the Ornstein dial for the "Corrupted Dragon Slayer"  mini boss

objects.description: Use state 3 on the chest figure for enemy
Use state 3 on the chest figure for the enemy
Shuffle the items with <R> while in the bag
Chest token without mimics among them

objects.description:
Lock the top half of the dial (The part with the Boss name and image)

Use the knob attached to that segment to rotate the dial

If it isn't working, make sure you didn't lock the section of the dial that displays the numbers

Use the Ornstein dial for the "Corrupted Dragon Slayer"  mini boss

One-shot:
Buy a new item for 1 Soul
Upgrade Armor/Weapon for free

Campaign:
Buy a new item for 2 Souls
Upgrade Armor/Weapon for Free
Sell (Destroy) item for 1 Soul
